  rationale: AgentSimulator is the dependency bottleneck — all behavioral tests need it. Stale-penalty automation is src-only (no test infra dependency) so it parallelizes. Lifecycle tests need AgentSimulator + extended mock-pi. Docs/version alignment must be last to capture all changes.

V1 release plan: 5 phases — Foundation (AgentSimulator + CAPS.graphQueryTokenBudget) → Core Behavioral (Graphify Grounding + Smart Zone) → Infrastructure (stale-penalty automation) → Runtime (graph lifecycle tests) → Polish (v1 version/docs alignment). Phase 2 can run in parallel with Phases 0/1. Phase 3 depends on Phase 0. Phase 4 depends on all prior.
